[statusline-compound-component] [P4] Run full verification suite
tasks.description:
Run the complete verification suite to confirm the refactor is correct and introduces no regressions.

**Automated checks:**

1. TypeScript: `pnpm typecheck` — must produce zero errors across all packages
2. Linting: `pnpm lint` — must produce zero ESLint violations
3. Full test suite: `pnpm test -- --run` — all tests across client and server must pass
4. Specific status feature tests: `pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/status` — all tests pass including the new `StatusLine.test.tsx`

**Manual verification checklist:**

1. Start dev server: `pnpm dev`
2. Open a session in the browser
3. Verify the status bar renders with visible items (cwd, git, model, etc.)
4. Go to Settings and toggle individual status bar visibility booleans — confirm items animate in/out correctly with separators appearing/disappearing
5. Verify separator behavior: middot between items, no separator before the first item, no orphaned separators when items exit
6. Test mobile viewport (resize browser or use devtools): confirm swipe-to-collapse gesture still works, DragHandle is functional
7. Test interactive overlays: click model item (dropdown appears), click permission item (dropdown appears), click tunnel item (dialog appears), click version item (popover appears), click sound item (toggles)
8. Confirm the container fades out when the last visible item is toggled off
9. Confirm the container fades in when the first item is toggled on from an empty state

**Files to review for completeness:**

- `apps/client/src/layers/features/status/ui/StatusLine.tsx` — compound component, no data fetching, under 250 LOC
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/status/index.ts` — all 9 item components exported
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/ui/ChatStatusSection.tsx` — data hooks present, compound API used, no `sessionStatus` prop passed to StatusLine
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/status/__tests__/StatusLine.test.tsx` — 12 tests, all passing

**Acceptance criteria:**
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` exits with code 0
- [ ] `pnpm lint` exits with code 0
- [ ] `pnpm test -- --run` exits with code 0
- [ ] Visual parity confirmed: status bar looks and animates identically to before the refactor
- [ ] All interactive overlays (dropdowns, toggles, dialogs, popovers) function correctly
- [ ] Mobile gesture (swipe-to-collapse) works
- [ ] No individual item component files were modified
- [ ] No server-side files were modified
